# Exposure IQ
> A high-precision exposure calculation engine (APEX-CAL™) for professional DSLR and mirrorless photography.

## Core Purpose
Exposure IQ is a technical utility designed for manual photographers. It replaces guesswork with clinical physics, utilizing the Additive System of Photographic Exposure (APEX) to calculate optimal ISO, Aperture, and Shutter Speed values.

## Pricing
- **Free Tier:** General photography mode with full exposure calculations. No time limit, no credit card required.
- **Pro:** $12.99 USD — one-time purchase, no subscription, no renewal. Family Sharing enabled.

## Technical Specifications
- **Core Engine:** APEX-CAL™ (High-precision mathematical exposure model)
- **Photography Modes:** 10 total — General (free), Portrait, Landscape, Action, Low Light, Macro, Astrophotography, Night Photography, Aperture Priority, Shutter Priority
- **Target Hardware:** Digital SLR and Mirrorless cameras (Manual Mode)
- **Privacy Standards:** 100% on-device processing. No data collection, no tracking, no cloud dependency. Fully offline capable.
- **Platform:** iOS 17.0+
